action_set_definitions.name: query_patient_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental state including vitals, symptom scores, lab values, and the current treatment step index.

action_set_definitions.name: administer_medication
action_set_definitions.description: Administers a specific type and dosage of medication to the patient to alter physiological or symptom states.

medication_class.description: The class of medication to be administered.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_surgical_procedure
action_set_definitions.description: Executes a surgical or restorative medical procedure intended to resolve the primary pathology.

procedure_type.description: The name/type of the surgical intervention.

action_set_definitions.name: progress_treatment_phase
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the environment to the next treatment cycle (treatment_step_index increments by 1). This allows time for medications to take effect and updates clinical markers.

state_description.patient_vitals: Current physiological markers including heart_rate, blood_pressure, and respiratory_rate.
state_description.symptom_scores: Numerical intensity of symptoms (e.g., pain, nausea) on a scale of 0-10.
state_description.active_medications: List of medications currently in the patient's system and their remaining duration/effect.
state_description.lab_values: The current internal biochemical state (e.g., blood glucose, white blood cell count).
state_description.treatment_step_index: The current step count in the sequencing protocol.
state_description.clinical_stability: A categorical assessment of the patient's overall status (e.g., stable, guarding, critical).
